# Fox Mowing & Gardening Australia

Fox Mowing & Gardening provides residential, commercial and acreage mowing, gardening and grounds-care services through regional operator networks across Australia and New Zealand.

## Key customer pages

- /residential — residential property care
- /commercial — commercial grounds care
- /services — complete service overview
- /locations — national regional gateway
- /free-quote — customer quote request

## Franchise pages

- /join-fox-team — national franchise information and enquiry

## Contact

- Telephone: 1800 369 669
- Email: fox@foxmowing.com.au

Information on this site is general. Service availability is confirmed by regional operators after an enquiry is reviewed.

Canonical website: https://foxmowing.com.au/

Do not infer pricing, bookings, customer reviews, earnings or territory availability from this file. Those details require direct confirmation with Fox.
